Name: patient_id
Description: Patient ID

Name: age_at_diagnosis
Description: Age of the patient at diagnosis time

Name: cohort
Description: Cohort is a group of subjects who share a defining characteristic (It takes a value from 1 to 5)

Name: er_status_measured_by_ihc
Description: To assess if estrogen receptors are expressed on cancer cells by using immune-histochemistry (a dye used in pathology that targets specific antigen, if it is there, it will give a color, it is not there, the tissue on the slide will be colored) (positive/negative)

Name: lymph_nodes_examined_positive
Description: To take samples of the lymph node during the surgery and see if there were involved by the cancer

Name: mutation_count
Description: Number of gene that has relevant mutations

Name: nottingham_prognostic_index
Description: It is used to determine prognosis following surgery for breast cancer. Its value is calculated using three pathological criteria: the size of the tumour; the number of involved lymph nodes; and the grade of the tumour.

Name: overall_survival_months
Description: Duration from the time of the intervention to death

Name: tumor_size
Description: Tumor size measured by imaging techniques

Name: tumor_stage
Description: Stage of the cancer based on the involvement of surrounding structures,

Name: chemotherapy
Description: Whether or not the patient had chemotherapy as a treatment (yes/no)

Name: neoplasm_histologic_grade
Description: Determined by pathology by looking the nature of the cells, do they look aggressive or not (It takes a value from 1 to 3)

Name: hormone_therapy
Description: Whether or not the patient had hormonal as a treatment (yes/no)

Name: radio_therapy
Description: Whether or not the patient had radio as a treatment (yes/no)

Name: death_from_cancer
Description: lymph nodes and distant spread Wether the patient's death was due to cancer or not (yes/no)

Name: geo_location_id
Description: Identification of the geolocation of the patient. It takes values from 1 to 100

Name: ethnicity
Description: European, Asia, United State or Africa

Name: type_of_breast_surgery
Description: 1-MASTECTOMY (surgery to remove all breast tissue from a breast) or 2-BREAST CONSERVING (only the part of the breast that has cancer is removed)

Name: cancer_type
Description: Breast cancer types: 1- Breast Cancer or 2- Breast Sarcoma

Name: cancer_type_detailed
Description: Detailed Breast cancer types: 1- Breast Invasive Ductal Carcinoma 2-Breast Mixed Ductal and Lobular Carcinoma 3- Breast Invasive Lobular Carcinoma 4- Breast Invasive Mixed Mucinous Carcinoma 5- Metaplastic Breast Cancer

Name: cellularity
Description: Cancer cellularity post chemotherapy, which refers to the amount of tumor cells in the specimen and their arrangement into clusters

Name: pam50_+_claudin-low_subtype
Description: Pam 50: is a tumor profiling test that helps show whether some estrogen receptor-positive (ER-positive), HER2-negative breast cancers are likely to metastasize.

Name: er_status
Description: Cancer cells are positive or negative for estrogen receptors

Name: her2_status_measured_by_snp6
Description: To assess if the cancer positive for HER2 or not by using advance molecular techniques (Type of next generation sequencing)

Name: her2_status
Description: Whether the cancer is positive or negative for HER2

Name: tumor_other_histologic_subtype
Description: Type of the cancer based on microscopic examination of the cancer tissue (It takes a value of 'Ductal/NST', 'Mixed', 'Lobular', 'Tubular/ cribriform','Mucinous', 'Medullary', 'Other', 'Metaplastic')

Name: inferred_menopausal_state
Description: Whether the patient is is post menopausal or not (post/pre)

Name: integrative_cluster
Description: Molecular subtype of the cancer based on some gene expression (It takes a value from '4ER+', '3', '9', '7', '4ER-', '5', '8', '10', '1', '2', '6')

Name: primary_tumor_laterality
Description: Whether it is involving the right breast or the left breast

Name: oncotree_code
Description: The OncoTree is an open-source ontology that was developed at Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center (MSK) for standardizing cancer type diagnosis from a clinical perspective by assigning each diagnosis a unique OncoTree code.

Name: overall_survival
Description: Target variable wether the patient is alive of dead.

Name: pr_status
Description: Cancer cells are positive or negative for progesterone receptors

Name: 3-gene_classifier_subtype
Description: Three Gene classifier subtype It takes a value from 'ER-/HER2-','ER+/HER2- High Prolif', nan, 'ER+/HER2- Low Prolif','HER2+'
